CustomObject.description: CEQ Standard Entity — process_decision_payload (evaluation record role). Per-criterion evaluation log: links a decision_element criterion to a process_instance and stores the evaluation inputs, boolean result, and explanation data. Distinct from nepa_decision_payload__c (which stores the final ROD/FONSI document record). Together these two objects satisfy the full CEQ process_decision_payload standard: nepa_decision_log__c for per-criterion screening/evaluation audit; nepa_decision_payload__c for the final structured determination document. Supports administrative record completeness and Decision Explainer integration if available in the target org.

fields.description: The NEPA process (IndividualApplication) this evaluation log belongs to. MasterDetail — deleting the process cascades deletion of all child logs. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.process.
fields.inlineHelpText: The NEPA review process this evaluation log documents.
fields.label: NEPA Process

fields.description: The decision element criterion evaluated in this log entry. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.process_decision_element.
fields.inlineHelpText: The specific criterion from the decision element catalog that was evaluated.
fields.label: Decision Element

fields.description: The project (Program) associated with this evaluation. Denormalized from the process for direct project-level querying. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.project.
fields.inlineHelpText: Project associated with this evaluation log.
fields.label: Project

fields.description: Parent log entry for hierarchical evaluation chains (e.g., a sub-criterion log nested under a composite criterion log). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.parent_payload.
fields.inlineHelpText: Parent log entry for nested evaluation chains.
fields.label: Parent Log

fields.description: JSON object containing the input data used to evaluate this criterion (e.g., {"acreage": 4.2, "action_type": "OilGas_Drilling", "agency": "BLM"}). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.evaluation_data.
fields.inlineHelpText: JSON input data used to evaluate this criterion.
fields.label: Evaluation Data (JSON)

fields.description: Narrative response to the decision element for this process — the applicant's or reviewer's answer to the screening question. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.response.
fields.inlineHelpText: Narrative response to the screening criterion.
fields.label: Response

fields.description: Text outcome of the evaluation (e.g., "CE Qualifies", "Extraordinary Circumstances Triggered", "Insufficient Data"). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.result.
fields.inlineHelpText: Text outcome of this evaluation (e.g., "CE Qualifies", "Escalate to EA").
fields.label: Result

fields.description: Boolean pass/fail result of this criterion evaluation. True = criterion satisfied (e.g., CE qualifies); False = criterion not satisfied (e.g., acreage exceeds limit, requires EA). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.result_bool.
fields.inlineHelpText: True if this criterion was satisfied; False if not.
fields.label: Result (Pass/Fail)

fields.description: Supplemental notes explaining the result, including edge cases, borderline determinations, or manual override rationale. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.result_notes.
fields.inlineHelpText: Notes explaining the result, especially for borderline or manually overridden evaluations.
fields.label: Result Notes

fields.description: JSON object containing structured result data beyond the text result (e.g., matched CE code, risk score breakdown, spatial intersection results). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.result_data.
fields.inlineHelpText: Structured result data as JSON (e.g., matched CE code, computed scores).
fields.label: Result Data (JSON)

fields.description: Source of the evaluation result: BRE (Business Rules Engine), Manual, AI (model-generated), or External (third-party system). Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.result_source.
fields.inlineHelpText: How this result was produced: BRE, Manual, AI, or External.
fields.label: Result Source

fields.description: Human-readable annotation describing the evaluation data — its source, quality, or any known gaps. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.data_annotation.
fields.inlineHelpText: Annotation on the evaluation input data (source, quality, known gaps).
fields.label: Data Annotation

fields.description: Structured JSON annotation on the evaluation data, for machine-readable quality and provenance metadata. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.evaluation_data_annotation.
fields.inlineHelpText: Structured JSON annotation on the evaluation data for machine-readable metadata.
fields.label: Evaluation Data Annotation (JSON)

fields.description: Extension bag for agency-specific or non-standard properties. Stores arbitrary JSON for interoperability with systems that require fields beyond the CEQ standard schema. Maps to CEQ standard process_decision_payload.other (jsonb) property.
fields.inlineHelpText: JSON extension bag for additional properties not covered by the standard schema.
fields.label: Other (JSON)

fields.description: Version identifier for this decision log record. Required provenance field per CEQ Data and Technology Standard v1.2.
fields.label: Data Record Version

fields.description: The federal agency that originated this decision log record. Required provenance field per CEQ Data and Technology Standard v1.2.
fields.inlineHelpText: Agency that originated this record (e.g., BLM, USFS, USACE).
fields.label: Data Source Agency

fields.description: The source system from which this record was ingested or originated. Required provenance field per CEQ Data and Technology Standard v1.2.
fields.inlineHelpText: Originating system (e.g., BRE, CE Screener, manual entry).
fields.label: Data Source System

fields.description: The federal agency responsible for maintaining this record. Required provenance field per CEQ Data and Technology Standard v1.2.
fields.inlineHelpText: Agency responsible for this record's ongoing accuracy.
fields.label: Record Owner Agency

fields.description: Timestamp when this record was retrieved or imported from an external source system. Required provenance field per CEQ Data and Technology Standard v1.2.
fields.inlineHelpText: When this record was imported from an external system, if applicable.
fields.label: Retrieved Timestamp

CustomObject.label: NEPA Decision Log
